mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT C.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, COALESCE(D.VALUE, '') FIELDCOMMENT, C.COLUMN_NAME FIELDNAME, UPPER(C.DATA_TYPE) FIELDTYPE, CASE C.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'varchar' THEN LTRIM(STR(C.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH)) ELSE '' END FIELDLENGTH, CASE C.IS_NULLABLE WHEN 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END ALLOWNULL, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(C.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', ''), '(', ''), ')', '') DEFAULTVALUE, C.NUMERIC_PRECISION PRECISION, C.NUMERIC_SCALE SCALE FROM SYS.COLUMNS B LEFT JOIN SYS.EXTENDED_PROPERTIES D ON D.MAJOR_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND D.MINOR_ID = B.COLUMN_ID AND D.NAME = 'MS_Description' LEFT JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS C ON C.COLUMN_NAME = B.NAME AND B.OBJECT_ID = OBJECT_ID(C.TABLE_NAME) LEFT JOIN (SELECT T.NAME TABLE_NAME, T.OBJECT_ID FROM SYS.TABLES T) V ON B.OBJECT_ID = V.OBJECT_ID AND C.TABLE_NAME = V.TABLE_NAME ) T

SELECT C.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, COALESCE(D.VALUE, '') FIELDCOMMENT, C.COLUMN_NAME FIELDNAME, UPPER(C.DATA_TYPE) FIELDTYPE, CASE C.DATA_TYPE WHEN 'varchar' THEN LTRIM(STR(C.CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH)) ELSE '' END FIELDLENGTH, CASE C.IS_NULLABLE WHEN 'YES' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END ALLOWNULL, REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(C.COLUMN_DEFAULT, ''), '''', ''), '(', ''), ')', '') DEFAULTVALUE, C.NUMERIC_PRECISION PRECISION, C.NUMERIC_SCALE SCALE FROM SYS.COLUMNS B LEFT JOIN SYS.EXTENDED_PROPERTIES D ON D.MAJOR_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND D.MINOR_ID = B.COLUMN_ID AND D.NAME = 'MS_Description' LEFT JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS C ON C.COLUMN_NAME = B.NAME AND B.OBJECT_ID = OBJECT_ID(C.TABLE_NAME) LEFT JOIN (SELECT T.NAME TABLE_NAME, T.OBJECT_ID FROM SYS.TABLES T) V ON B.OBJECT_ID = V.OBJECT_ID AND C.TABLE_NAME = V.TABLE_NAME WHERE UPPER(C.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName}

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT B.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, A.NAME INDEXNAME, CASE WHEN A.IS_PRIMARY_KEY = 1 THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}' WHEN A.IS_UNIQUE = 1 THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}' ELSE '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}' END INDEXTYPE, STUFF((SELECT ',' + C.NAME FROM SYS.INDEX_COLUMNS B LEFT JOIN SYS.COLUMNS C ON B.OBJECT_ID = C.OBJECT_ID AND B.COLUMN_ID = C.COLUMN_ID WHERE A.OBJECT_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND A.INDEX_ID = B.INDEX_ID FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 1, '') INDEXFIELD FROM SYS.INDEXES A, (SELECT T.NAME TABLE_NAME, T.OBJECT_ID FROM SYS.TABLES T) B WHERE A.OBJECT_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND A.TYPE_DESC != 'HEAP' ) T

SELECT B.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, A.NAME INDEXNAME, CASE WHEN A.IS_PRIMARY_KEY = 1 THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@primarykey}' WHEN A.IS_UNIQUE = 1 THEN '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@unique}' ELSE '${@com.sunwayworld.cloud.module.lcdp.table.helper.IndexType@regular}' END INDEXTYPE, STUFF((SELECT ',' + C.NAME FROM SYS.INDEX_COLUMNS B LEFT JOIN SYS.COLUMNS C ON B.OBJECT_ID = C.OBJECT_ID AND B.COLUMN_ID = C.COLUMN_ID WHERE A.OBJECT_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND A.INDEX_ID = B.INDEX_ID FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 1, '') INDEXFIELD FROM SYS.INDEXES A, (SELECT T.NAME TABLE_NAME, T.OBJECT_ID FROM SYS.TABLES T) B WHERE A.OBJECT_ID = B.OBJECT_ID AND A.TYPE_DESC != 'HEAP' AND UPPER(B.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} AND TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = #{viewName} AND TABLE_TYPE = 'VIEW'

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT A.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, D.VALUE TABLEDESC FROM (SELECT T.NAME TABLE_NAME, T.OBJECT_ID FROM SYS.TABLES T) A LEFT JOIN SYS.EXTENDED_PROPERTIES D ON D.MAJOR_ID = A.OBJECT_ID AND D.MINOR_ID = 0 AND D.NAME = 'MS_Description') T
ORDER BY T.TABLENAME

SELECT A.TABLE_NAME TABLENAME, D.VALUE TABLEDESC FROM (SELECT T.NAME TABLE_NAME, T.OBJECT_ID FROM SYS.TABLES T) A LEFT JOIN SYS.EXTENDED_PROPERTIES D ON D.MAJOR_ID = A.OBJECT_ID AND D.MINOR_ID = 0 AND D.NAME = 'MS_Description' WHERE UPPER(A.TABLE_NAME) = #{tableName}

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT NAME TABLENAME FROM SYS.OBJECTS WHERE type='U') T
ORDER BY T.TABLENAME

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) VIEWNAME, UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) TABLENAME, SUBSTRING(V.VIEW_DEFINITION, CHARINDEX(' AS ',UPPER(V.VIEW_DEFINITION)) + 4, LEN(V.VIEW_DEFINITION)) SELECTSTATEMENT FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS V ) T
ORDER BY T.VIEWNAME

SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT NAME TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'table' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM SYS.OBJECTS WHERE type='U' UNION SELECT UPPER(V.TABLE_NAME) TABLEORVIEWNAME, 'view' DBSTRUCTURETYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS V ) T
ORDER BY T.TABLEORVIEWNAME
